servicesOverview.heading: Everything your brand needs to win online

cards.title: Web & E-commerce
cards.text: Beautiful, lightning-fast websites and online stores that turn browsers into buyers, effortless on every screen.

cards.text: Put your brand in your customers' pocket with sleek apps for iPhone and Android, built once, launched everywhere.

cards.text: Finally know what's working. We turn your data into clear answers and reports you can actually trust.

cards.title: CRO & Experimentation
cards.text: Get more sales from the visitors you already have. We test, learn, and fine-tune until the numbers climb.

cards.title: Accessibility & Performance
cards.text: Faster pages, happier visitors, higher rankings, experiences that load in a blink and welcome everyone.

cards.title: Social Media Ads
cards.text: Reach the right people and watch it pay off, scroll-stopping campaigns with every dollar accounted for.

approach.heading: Design, build, measure, optimize

why.body: meemur is founder-led by Onur Yanar. With 10+ years and 60+ brands behind him, you get senior expertise on every project, and you work directly with the person doing the work, never an account manager.

hero.title: A boutique studio, built on craft and data
hero.lead: meemur is a small, founder-led digital agency. We pair senior front-end engineering with a measurement mindset, so what we build is both beautiful and accountable.

founder.name: Onur Yanar
bio: I'm Onur, a web and analytics specialist with 10+ years of experience. I've built online stores and growth-tracking systems for 60+ brands, and I started meemur to do that work directly, without layers in between.

My background blends engineering and statistics, so I care as much about how fast and welcoming your site feels as I do about the data behind every decision. When you work with meemur, you work with me.
founder.photoAlt: The meemur studio storefront in Ankara, a glass-door entrance with signage reading “We make the web work for you.”

values.title: Senior, hands-on
values.text: You always work directly with the person doing the work.

values.title: Data over opinions
values.text: Decisions are backed by clean analytics and testing.

values.title: Built to last
values.text: Accessible, fast, maintainable code, no shortcuts.

meta.title: Privacy policy · meemur
meta.description: How meemur handles your data: what the contact form, newsletter, and analytics collect, who processes it, and how to reach us about your rights.
meta.ogDescription: How meemur handles your data, in plain English.

hero.title: Privacy policy
hero.lead: The short version: we collect as little as we can, we never sell your data, and you can email us anytime to see or delete what we hold.

sections.heading: Who we are
sections.body: meemur is a boutique digital agency founded and run by Onur Yanar. This policy covers meemur.com, which is hosted on Cloudflare Pages. For anything privacy-related, write to contact@meemur.com.

sections.heading: What we collect, and why
sections.body:
• Contact form. Your name, email address, and message are delivered straight to our inbox as an email, and we don't store them in a database. Submissions pass through a Cloudflare Turnstile spam check before they're sent.
  • Newsletter. If you subscribe in the footer, we receive your email address and keep it only to send you occasional tips. Unsubscribe anytime by emailing us or replying to any newsletter.
  • Analytics. We use Google Analytics 4 (loaded via Google Tag Manager) to understand how the site is used: pages visited, approximate location, and device type. We look at this data in aggregate; it doesn't tell us who you are.
  • Hosting and security. Cloudflare processes technical data such as IP addresses in server logs to serve the site and protect it from abuse.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: The only cookies we set ourselves come from Google Analytics, which uses them to recognize repeat visits. You can block or delete cookies in your browser settings, or opt out of Google Analytics entirely with Google's browser add-on. The site works fine without cookies.

sections.heading: Who we share data with
sections.body: Nobody, beyond the services that run the site on our behalf: Cloudflare (hosting and spam protection), Google (analytics), and Resend (delivers form submissions to our inbox as email). We never sell your data, and this site runs no advertising trackers.

sections.heading: How long we keep it
sections.body: Messages you send us are kept in our inbox like any business correspondence. Newsletter addresses are kept until you unsubscribe. Analytics data is retained by Google Analytics for up to 14 months, then deleted automatically.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: Wherever you are (including under the EU's GDPR and Türkiye's KVKK), you can ask us what data we hold about you, have it corrected or deleted, or object to how it's used. Email contact@meemur.com and we'll sort it out within a few days, no forms required.

sections.heading: Changes to this policy
sections.body: If we change how the site handles data (say, a new analytics tool or a real mailing-list provider), we'll update this page and the date at the top.
